mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tutor_profile ( id, user_id, phone, headline, bio, self_intro, video_url, default_zoom_url, bank_name, account_number, account_holder, is_verified, rating_avg, review_count ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{phone}, #{headline}, #{bio}, #{selfIntro}, #{videoUrl}, #{defaultZoomUrl}, #{bankName}, #{accountNumber}, #{accountHolder}, #{verified}, #{ratingAvg}, #{reviewCount} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE phone = VALUES(phone), headline = VALUES(headline), bio = VALUES(bio), self_intro = VALUES(self_intro), video_url = VALUES(video_url), default_zoom_url = VALUES(default_zoom_url), bank_name = VALUES(bank_name), account_number = VALUES(account_number), account_holder = VALUES(account_holder), updated_at = NOW();
mapper.select: SELECT tp.no, tp.user_id, tp.id, tp.phone, u.profile_img AS profile_img, tp.headline, tp.bio, tp.self_intro, tp.video_url, tp.default_zoom_url, tp.bank_name, tp.account_number, tp.account_holder, tp.is_verified, tp.rating_avg, tp.review_count, tp.created_at, tp.updated_at FROM tutor_profile tp JOIN users u ON tp.user_id = u.id WHERE tp.user_id = #{userId}
